# limitations under the License.
#

# Request
string topic_name
float64 expected_hz
float64 tolerance_percent  # i.e. 5 = 5% of expected_hz
bool clear_expected
bool add_topic_if_missing  # add topic to monitoring if not already
---
# Response
bool success
string message

request_fields.name: add_topic_if_missing
request_fields.comment: add topic to monitoring if not already
